title: Fireflies
body:
# Fireflies

Introducing **Fireflies**, they spawn in humid areas like swamps and mangroves.

## Features: > **Cozy Humidity** give swamps a new ambient critter: The Firefly; they spawn from a new block The Luminescent Soil which spawn in humid areas near water sources.

> **Illuminate Your Surroundings** Capture fireflies with the new Catching net item and place them insidethe Firefly Jar to add some sparkles to your builds

> **Gotta catch them all** There are four types of colored fireflies to catch, and they become rarer the farther to the right, with blue being extremely rare.
